definition: Perceived fairness credibility transparency trustworthiness and public acceptability of institutional authority
measurement_note: Use trust surveys perceived fairness complaint patterns participation confidence in services and historical trust context

definition: Administrative financial technical staffing data legal and operational ability to implement decisions
measurement_note: Use staffing vacancies budgets procurement time backlogs expertise data systems field capacity and service delivery indicators

definition: Ability to revise rules procedures partnerships and operating modes under changing conditions
measurement_note: Use scenario planning adaptive rules discretion protocols pilots emergency authority with safeguards and policy-revision pathways

definition: Ability to align action across agencies sectors jurisdictions and scales
measurement_note: Use interagency agreements shared data joint exercises role clarity escalation pathways conflict resolution and response coherence

definition: Ability to detect errors preserve memory evaluate outcomes and convert lessons into changed practice
measurement_note: Use after-action implementation rule updates training budget changes evaluation use scenario revision and public trackers

definition: Ability to review correct constrain and explain institutional power
measurement_note: Use audits oversight transparency corruption controls due process appeals enforcement equity and independent review

definition: Extent to which institutions reduce unequal access burden exposure and harm
measurement_note: Use administrative burden access equity language and disability access aid distribution enforcement equity representation and rights protection

definition: Capital administrative political legal technical and civic burden required to implement a strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger feasibility review capacity planning legal review and stakeholder governance design
